problem.title: 7. Merge Intervals
problem.problemStatement: Given an array of intervals where intervals[i] = [starti, endi], merge all overlapping intervals, and return an array of the non-overlapping intervals that cover all the intervals in the input.

examples.explanation: Intervals [1,3] and [2,6] overlap, so they are merged into [1,6].
Intervals[1,4] and [4,5] are considered overlapping, so they are merged into [1,5].

problem.constraints:
• 1 <= intervals.length <= 104
  • intervals[i].length == 2
  • 0 <= starti <= endi <= 104
